summary: Specified the hosted message target-Site pull/admit/finalize boundary. The new doctrine separates remote preservation, descriptor-only local admission planning, local Canonical Inbox or Admission Rejection Ledger decisions, and remote finalization. It defines evidence requirements for admitted/rejected/deferred/expired/superseded/error outcomes, keeps submit/poll/read/finalize/admin capabilities separate, and maps current /api/messages routes to Remote Candidate Exchange semantics without renaming routes.

verification.result: passed: no whitespace errors; Git reported line-ending warnings for existing markdown files

verification.command: rg -n "Remote preservation, local admission|Descriptor-Only Local Admission Plan|Local Decisions|Finalization Payload|Capability Separation|Existing Route Compatibility|POST /api/messages|GET /api/messages/pending|finalize|admitted|rejected|deferred|expired|superseded|error" docs\product\hosted-message-local-admission-boundary.md
verification.result: passed: required flow, plan semantics, outcomes, capabilities, and route compatibility present

residuals: No hosted Cloudflare state was deployed or mutated.
Current hosted route implementation may still support only a subset of the specified finalization statuses; route compatibility is preserved for future widening.
